formula: Cytokinin = (max(IPT, 0.01) * max(LOG, 0.01))^(1/2) * min(1/max(CKX2 * CKX9 * RR_TYPEA, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

D53 = (max(IPA1, 0.01) * max(Sucrose, 0.01))^(1/2) * min(1/max(D14 * D3, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

MOC1 = (max(SLR1, 0.01))^(1/1) * min(1/max(D53 * TAD1 * TE, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

TB1 = (max(BZR1, 0.01) * max(CCA1, 0.01) * max(IPA1, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(Cytokinin * HK4 * NGR5 * T6P * VIL2, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Tiller_Number = (max(DLT, 0.01) * max(FON1, 0.01) * max(LAX1, 0.01) * max(PIN9, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(ABA * PIN1B * TB1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
